description: A square graphic on a faint American-flag background. Dark blue and red text reads Under President Trump, America's benefits will not be given to those who despise this country., followed by Citizenship is a privilege, not a right. A band across the bottom, flanked by small star symbols, reads U.S. CITIZENSHIP & IMMIGRATION SERVICES.
notable_text: Under President Trump, America's benefits will not be given to those who despise this country; Citizenship is a privilege, not a right; U.S. CITIZENSHIP & IMMIGRATION SERVICES
